description: Street gang based in Buffalo, New York, founded in the 1960s-1970s in the Fruit Belt area. Primarily African American, it engages in drug trafficking, weapons smuggling, and murder. The gang is in direct opposition to the Central Park Gang and has been involved in ongoing violent conflicts.

country_links.evidence_quote: The group sells illegal narcotics and weaponry over state lines into Pennsylvania in order to finance illegal activity...
country_links.context: The gang sells illegal narcotics and weaponry over state lines into Pennsylvania.
